title: Glyptocaryopsis anaglyptica
taxonomy: Glyptocaryopsis anaglyptica is a species of flowering plant in the family Burseraceae. It is native to the tropical regions of Africa. This species has been classified as part of the genus Glyptocaryopsis, which was previously considered a synonym of Garcinia. However, recent studies have reinstated Glyptocaryopsis as a distinct genus. The classification of Glyptocaryopsis anaglyptica is still a subject of ongoing research and debate.
